subcodes.first_line: O Beloved of My heart! The exalted missive which bore the name of this evanescent servant - its resplendent brilliance hath illumined the world of existence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محبوب فوادی دستخط عالی که باسم خادم فانی بود سنا برقش عالم وجود را روشن
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @power of prayer, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
